title: pronephrium liukiuense

side_effects: Pronephrium liukiuense can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems in sensitive individuals. Ingesting the plant's sap or leaves can cause nausea, vomiting, and stomach pain due to its toxic compounds.
